title: Courgette and Australian Cheese Gratin
description: A creamy and delicious side dish featuring courgettes, Australian cheese, and a hint of springy freshness.
instructions: Slice courgettes into 1/2 cm thick rounds and place in a colander.
Sprinkle with salt and let sit for 10 minutes to draw out excess moisture.
Rinse the courgettes and pat dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, combine grated cheese, butter, spring onions, and garlic.
Add the courgette slices to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the cheese mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Note: If using a different type of cheese, adjust the amount of butter accordingly to achieve the right consistency.
